description_long: This is a square throw pillow with a light beige background and a repeating pattern of white and brown kittens in various playful poses. The pillow appears plush and well-stuffed, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, soft fabric exterior. The kitten illustrations are interspersed with small white butterfly motifs, adding a whimsical touch to the design. The surface is matte and the fabric looks like a soft cotton or polyester blend, typical for decorative pillows. There are no visible seams, tags, or brand logos on any side. The pillow is clean and appears to be in pristine condition, isolated against a plain background.
description: A square beige pillow featuring a playful kitten and butterfly pattern, with a soft, plush appearance and smooth fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full kitten and butterfly pattern on a light beige background, with the pillow's square shape and slight puffiness visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's narrow edge, with the pattern slightly distorted and the thickness of the stuffing evident.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, showing the kitten and butterfly pattern, with no visible seams or tags.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pillow's edge and thickness, with the pattern appearing mirrored and compressed.
attribute_pattern: animal print (kitten illustrations) with butterfly motifs
